sets.rationale: Numbers with high coefficient of variation across quarterly draws — appearing in tight clusters then going quiet. Historically bursty; each draw is still independent.
Numbers drawn below their long-run expected frequency. There is no statistical 'due' effect — each draw is independent.
Numbers recurring most often within the recent 30-draw window. A pattern in past noise, not a forecast of what comes next.
A balanced mix of frequently, rarely and averagely drawn numbers. Provided as a themed alternative to a random quick-pick.
Numbers from the side of the range (1-20 or 21-40) most represented in the recent year of draws. Positional lean carries no predictive weight.
